TE Operational Flow Order -- UPDATE


Notice Text:

In order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, TE is issuing an update to the previously posted Operational Flow Order (OFO) pursuant to Section 4.3 of the General Terms and Conditions of TE's FERC Gas Tariff effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 24, 2026, to all OBA and Transportation Contracts, with the exception of those governed by a FERC gas tariff, in Texas Eastern's Market Area Zones M1-24, M1-30, M2-24 and M2-30.

This OFO does not affect the ability of TE to receive or deliver quantities of gas for scheduled nominations to any customer or pipeline.

 

The penalty will be equal to three times the daily Platts Gas Daily "Daily Price Survey" posting for the High Common price for the geographical region, as defined in Section 8.5(a) of the General Terms and Conditions of TE's FERC Gas Tariff for the day on which such violation occurred.  TE will not permit retroactive nominations to avoid an OFO penalty except for shippers who can acquire day ending Due Shipper supply for No Due Pipe OFO's and Due Pipe supply for Due Shipper OFO's.


This OFO will remain in effect until further notice.

 

The previously posted Operational Flow Order for Market Area Zone M-3 will continue to remain in effect until further notice.

 

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.

Please refer to the table below for the effected TETCO zones, dates, and tolerance percentages.

 

Zone

Gas Day Feb 22 - Feb 23

Gas Day Feb 24 and until further notice

M1-24"

No OFO*

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 5%/250

M1-30"

No OFO*

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 5%/250

M2-24"

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 10%/250

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 5%/250

M2-30"

No Due Pipe 10%/250

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 5%/250

No Due Pipe 5%/250

No OFO*

WLA

No OFO*

ELA

No OFO*

No OFO*

Customer Specific

No OFO*

No OFO*


*As noted above, all imbalance payback must be coordinated through TE's account representative.  In the event uncoordinated imbalance payback occurs and it jeopardizes system operations, customer specific OFOs may be required.

NOTE:

Deliveries No DP : Shippers are not to take more than scheduled

Deliveries No DS : Shippers are not to take less than scheduled

Receipts No DP : Shippers are not to give less than scheduled

Receipts No DS : Shippers are not to give more than scheduled
